name: kamae-scala
description: Kamae (構え) - robust server-side Scala design and review skills

interface.shortDescription: Robust Scala domain design and review
interface.longDescription: Design and review server-side Scala domain code with typed states, Either-based errors, validated boundaries, PII-safe patterns, and adversarial review checklists.
defaultPrompt: Use $kamae-scala to refine this Scala domain model.
Use $kamae-scala-review to review this Scala diff.
